seo.title: Privacy Policy - VoiceAI
seo.description: Learn how VoiceAI collects, uses, and protects your personal information.

section1.title: Information We Collect
section1.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, use our services, or contact us for support. This may include your name, email address, phone number, company name, and payment information. We also collect usage data, voice recordings (with your consent), and analytics data to improve our AI voice agent platform.

section2.title: How We Use Your Information
section2.content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, to communicate with you, to process transactions, and to protect our users and services. Voice data is used specifically to train and improve our conversational AI models, subject to your consent and applicable data protection laws.

section3.title: Information Sharing
section3.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information with third-party service providers who assist us in operating our services, subject to confidentiality obligations. This includes cloud infrastructure providers, payment processors, and analytics services. We may also disclose information when required by law or to protect our rights.

section4.title: Data Security
section4.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized or unlawful processing, accidental loss, destruction, or damage. Our platform is SOC 2 Type II certified, and we use encryption in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256) for all sensitive data, including voice recordings and conversation transcripts.

section5.title: Your Rights
section5.content: Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information, including the right to access, correct, or delete your data. You may also have the right to restrict or object to processing, and the right to data portability. To exercise these rights, please contact us at privacy@voiceai.com.

section6.title: Cookies and Tracking Technologies
section6.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to collect and track information about your activity on our services. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our services.

section7.title: Children's Privacy
section7.content: Our services are not directed to individuals under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you become aware that a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us and we will take steps to delete such information.

section8.title: International Data Transfers
section8.content: Your information may be transferred to — and maintained on — computers located outside of your state, province, country, or other governmental jurisdiction where data protection laws may differ. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, including Standard Contractual Clauses and adequacy decisions where applicable.

section9.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
section9.content: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the 'Last updated' date. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.

section10.title: Contact Us
section10.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at privacy@voiceai.com or write to us at VoiceAI, 123 Innovation Drive, Suite 500, San Francisco, CA 94105.

seo.title: Terms of Service - VoiceAI
seo.description: Read the terms and conditions for using VoiceAI's services.

section1.title: Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By accessing or using VoiceAI's services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this service. You must be at least 18 years old and have the authority to enter into binding agreements to use our services.

section2.title: Use License
section2.content: Permission is granted to temporarily use VoiceAI's services for personal or commercial purposes subject to the restrictions in these terms. This is a license, not a transfer of title. You may not modify, copy, distribute, transmit, display, perform, reproduce, publish, or create derivative works from our services without prior written consent.

section3.title: User Responsibilities
section3.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to provide accurate and complete information when creating your account and to update such information to keep it accurate and complete. You must not use our services for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable laws.

section4.title: Limitation of Liability
section4.content: VoiceAI shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages resulting from your use of or inability to use the service. Our total liability to you for any claim arising out of or relating to these terms or our services shall not exceed the amount paid by you to VoiceAI during the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.

section5.title: Intellectual Property
section5.content: The VoiceAI platform, including all software, algorithms, voice models, user interface designs, and branding, is the exclusive property of VoiceAI and is protected by intellectual property laws. You retain ownership of your content and data, but grant VoiceAI a limited license to use such content solely to provide and improve our services.

section6.title: Termination
section6.content: VoiceAI may terminate or suspend your access to our services immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason, including if you breach these Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the services will cease immediately, and we may delete your account data in accordance with our data retention policies.

section7.title: Governing Law
section7.content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California, United States, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising under these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in San Francisco, California.

section8.title: Changes to These Terms
section8.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will provide notice of material changes by posting the updated Terms on this page and updating the 'Last updated' date. Your continued use of the services after any such changes constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms.

section9.title: Contact Us
section9.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at legal@voiceai.com or write to us at VoiceAI, 123 Innovation Drive, Suite 500, San Francisco, CA 94105.

seo.title: GDPR Compliance - VoiceAI
seo.description: Learn about VoiceAI's GDPR compliance and data protection measures.

section1.title: Our GDPR Commitment
section1.content: VoiceAI is committed to complying with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and ensuring the protection of personal data of EU residents. We have implemented comprehensive data protection policies, conducted data protection impact assessments, and appointed a dedicated Data Protection Officer to oversee our compliance efforts.

section2.title: Data Processing
section2.content: We act as a data processor for customer data and as a data controller for our own business data. We have implemented appropriate safeguards for cross-border data transfers, including Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission. We maintain a detailed record of all processing activities as required by Article 30 of the GDPR.

section3.title: Your Rights Under GDPR
section3.content: EU residents have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, and objection to processing. You also have the right to withdraw consent at any time and the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. We will respond to all valid requests within 30 days.

section4.title: Contact Our DPO
section4.content: For GDPR-related inquiries, please contact our Data Protection Officer at dpo@voiceai.com or write to us at VoiceAI Data Protection Officer, 123 Innovation Drive, Suite 500, San Francisco, CA 94105, USA.

section5.title: Data Retention
section5.content: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, including to satisfy any legal, accounting, or reporting requirements. Voice recordings and conversation transcripts are retained for a maximum of 90 days unless you request earlier deletion. Account data is retained for the duration of your subscription plus 30 days.

section6.title: Legal Basis for Processing
section6.content: We process personal data based on the following legal grounds: (a) your consent, (b) performance of a contract with you, (c) compliance with a legal obligation, (d) legitimate interests pursued by VoiceAI or a third party, where such interests are not overridden by your data protection rights. You can learn more about the specific legal basis we rely on by contacting our DPO.

section7.title: Data Protection Impact Assessment
section7.content: We have conducted Data Protection Impact Assessments (DPIAs) for all processing activities that are likely to result in a high risk to the rights and freedoms of individuals. This includes our voice AI processing pipeline, customer analytics, and automated decision-making systems. DPIA results are reviewed and updated annually.

section8.title: International Transfers
section8.content: When transferring personal data outside the EU/EEA, we ensure an adequate level of protection through appropriate safeguards such as Standard Contractual Clauses, binding corporate rules, or adequacy decisions. We maintain a list of all sub-processors and their locations, which is available upon request.
